name: Grace Doyle
ai_summary: Grace Doyle is a college student in Augusta, GA with 6+ months of experience caring for children ages 6 months to 12 years, setting activities and ensuring safety. She approaches conflicts by separating children, listening individually, and involving parents if needed, and believes her empathy and understanding of foster care experiences make her a great fit.
